stay. 

SHORT NAME: DPRTMNTL 

LONG NAME: DPRTMNTL_TOT_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with revenue 
center codes 0220–0999 from all claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of charges for all 
revenue centers other than accommodations 0100–0219).
